terms.title: Terms & Conditions
introduction: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern the use of the **Musticker** website and services operated by **Glophics Corp.** ("Company," "we," "us," or "our").

**Musticker** is an online printing service provider based in the **Republic of Korea**. By accessing or using our website, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the service.

sections.title: 1. Company Information
bullets: Company Name: Glophics Corp.
Brand Name: Musticker
Business Type: Online Printing Services
Country: Republic of Korea (South Korea)
Contact Email: [Insert official email]

groups.title: **Musticker provides customized online printing services, including but not limited to:**
**Services are provided in accordance with these Terms, the Privacy Policy, and applicable Korean laws.**

items: You are at least 18 years old or have legal capacity under Korean law.
You can legally enter into binding agreements.
All information you provide is accurate and truthful.

sections.title: 4. Membership & Account (If Applicable)
bullets: Users may be required to create an account to place orders
You are responsible for maintaining account security
Musticker is not liable for damages caused by unauthorized account use due to user negligence

groups.title: **1. Orders placed on the website constitute an offer by the user.**
**2. A contract is formed only when:**
items: Payment is successfully completed, and
Musticker confirms the order

groups.title: **3. We reserve the right to reject or cancel orders due to:**
items: Production limitations
Policy violations
Incorrect pricing or information

sections.title: 6. Pricing & Payment
bullets: Prices are displayed in KRW unless otherwise stated.
Prices may change without prior notice.
Payment must be completed before production begins.
Musticker is not responsible for delays caused by payment verification failures.

groups.title: **By submitting artwork or design files, you confirm that:**
items: You own or have lawful rights to the content.
The content does not infringe third-party intellectual property.
The content complies with Korean laws and public order.

groups.title: **Musticker is not responsible for:**
items: Typographical errors approved by the customer.
Color variation due to screen or printing limitations.
Low-quality results caused by improper files.

sections.title: 8. Proofing & Production
bullets: Digital proofs (if provided) must be reviewed carefully.
Approval of proofs constitutes final acceptance.
Orders **cannot be modified or canceled** once production begins.

sections.title: 9. Delivery & Turnaround Time
bullets: Production and delivery times are estimates
Delays may occur due to logistics, couriers, or force majeure.
Musticker is not liable for delays beyond reasonable control.

groups.title: In accordance with the **Electronic Commerce Consumer Protection Act (Korea):**
items: Customized products are **not eligible for cancellation or refund** once production starts

items.text: **Refunds or reprints may be granted only if:**
items: The product is defective, or
The product differs from the approved proof
Claims must be submitted within **[X] days** of receipt

sections.title: 11. Personal Information Protection
bullets: Personal information is collected and processed in accordance with the **Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA).**
Details are provided in our **Privacy Policy.**
Users may exercise their rights under PIPA at any time.

sections.title: 12. Intellectual Property Rights
bullets: All content on the website, including text, images, logos, software, and designs, is owned by **Glophics Corp.** or licensed parties.
Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or modification is prohibited.

groups.title: **Users must not:**
items: Use the site for unlawful purposes.
Upload illegal, harmful, or infringing content.
Attempt unauthorized access or disrupt services.
Violate Korean laws or public order.

groups.title: **Violations may result in service suspension or legal action.**
**To the extent permitted by Korean law:**
items: Musticker shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages
Liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the relevant order

groups.title: **Users agree to indemnify Glophics Corp. against claims arising from:**
items: Submitted content or artwork
Violation of these Terms
Violation of applicable laws or third-party rights

sections.title: 16. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent Korean courts.

sections.title: 17. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: Musticker may revise these Terms from time to time for legal or service reasons. Updated terms will become effective upon publication on the website.
